form_name: ACORD 138 CO (2015/12) - Colorado Garage and Dealers Coverages / Limits Section
description: Colorado-specific supplement attached to ACORD 128 for garage and dealer policies. Captures liability, physical damage, and garage keepers coverages with covered auto symbol assignments. Includes Colorado-mandated uninsured motorist selection, fraud warning disclosure, and dual applicant/producer signature requirements.

covered_auto_symbols.24: Owned Autos Other Than Private Passenger Autos Only
covered_auto_symbols.26: Owned Autos Subject to a Compulsory Uninsured Motorists Law
covered_auto_symbols.29: Non-Owned Autos Used in Your Auto Dealership
covered_auto_symbols.30: Autos Left With You for Service, Repair, Storage or Safekeeping

state_disclosures: Uninsured Motorists Bodily Injury coverage options explained and available up to BI liability limits
Uninsured Motorists Property Damage coverage options explained
Colorado fraud warning per Colorado Division of Insurance / Department of Regulatory Agencies
Coverage selections apply to all future renewals unless notified in writing
